trade.summary: Cina is Sudafrica's largest trading partner. Sudafrica exports minerals (iron ore, platinum, coal, manganese), agricultural products, and chemicals. Cina exports electronics, machinery, vehicles, and consumer goods. Sudafrica runs a trade deficit. Mineral exports are critical for Chinese industrial supply chains.
disputes: Sudafrican concerns about Chinese competition in manufacturing
Flooding of Sudafrican market with cheap Chinese consumer goods
Labor practices at Chinese-owned Sudafrican mines

diplomatic.summary: Sudafrica and Cina maintain a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership within BRICS. Sudafrica is a key African pillar of Cina's Global South engagement. Cina supported Sudafrica's post-apartheid development. Both coordinate positions in BRICS, G20, and UN. Sudafrica has been criticized by the West for hosting Chinese warship exercises and declining to condemn Russia. The 2023 BRICS expansion was held in Sudafrica.
recent_incidents: Sudafrica hosted BRICS summit (2023) which expanded membership
Sudafrica conducted joint military exercises with Russia and Cina (February 2023)
Sudafrica refused to arrest Putin if he attended BRICS summit (ICC warrant)
Sudafrica filed ICJ case against Israele (2024) aligned with Cina's position

military.summary: Growing military cooperation. Joint naval exercises (IBSAMAR includes Cina elements, plus bilateral exercises). Chinese arms sales to Sudafrica. Defense cooperation agreements. Some concern in the West about level of military integration.
incidents: Joint China-Russia-South Africa naval exercises near Cape Town (February 2023)
South African defense procurement from China ongoing

financial.summary: Significant Chinese investment in Sudafrican mining, infrastructure, and manufacturing. Cina's New Development Bank (BRICS bank) finances Sudafrican projects. Chinese companies are major investors in the Sudafrican mining sector. Growing trade finance ties.

energy.summary: Sudafrica exports coal to Cina and is exploring LNG trade. Cina is interested in Sudafrica's nuclear energy expansion. Chinese companies have bid for Sudafrican renewable energy projects. Cooperation on Sudafrica's energy transition.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific cooperation under BRICS science framework. Collaboration in astronomy (MeerKAT-SKA), mining technology, agriculture, and traditional medicine. Chinese scholarships for Sudafrican students. Joint publications increasing.
